(C) Superposition of the lesion shown in (A) with the model prediction incorporating 70 % anisotropy on electrical conductivity, oriented along the principal direction of anisotropy. (D) Experimental lesion for a case exhibiting low anisotropy along the fiber direction. (E) Superposition of the lesion shown in (D) with the model prediction without anisotropy. (F) Superposition of the lesion shown in (D) with the model prediction including 70 % anisotropy.
